name: AI Chatbot Site
description: A landing page for an AI assistant product with a working in-page demo chat powered by a sandboxed server function (/api/fn/chat).
prompt: Build a landing page for an AI assistant product called <product>: a nav, a hero, a features section with three capabilities, a working demo chat widget whose script POSTs {message} to a server function at /api/fn/chat and shows the reply, and a footer. Define the chat function in the model.
